title: CRR binomial price converges to Black-Scholes
lemma_statement:
-- CRR parametrization: u_n = exp(σ√(T/n)), d_n = exp(-σ√(T/n))
-- As n → ∞, the CRR binomial call price converges to Black-Scholes.
-- This is a placeholder conjecture; proof requires CLT machinery.

theorem crr_convergence_statement (S K r σ T : ℝ)
